steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The student wants to emphasize a similarity between Watch Your Step and Golden Connection. A correct answer must state something both sculptures share — not describe only one, compare their sizes, or contrast them.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'Grimanesa Amoros is the artist behind Watch Your Step...': describes only Watch Your Step. ✗
  • Choice B — 'At 100,000 cubic feet...Golden Connection cuts a larger figure...': highlights a size difference, not a similarity. ✗
  • Choice C — 'Watch Your Step is an LED light sculpture made by Grimanesa Amoros, as is Golden Connection.': the phrase "as is" directly links both sculptures as LED works by the same artist — a clear similarity. ✓
  • Choice D — 'The smooth LED domes...stand in contrast to the tangled LED tubes...': explicitly contrasts the two sculptures. ✗
That matches choice C — C is correct.
